description:
Modern, lightweight and multi-cluster Kubernetes GUI.

Modern, lightweight and multi-cluster Kubernetes GUI. Available on Windows, macOS and Linux.
Features:
- 💯 Connect to one or more clusters simultaneously
- ⚡️ Aggregated Log Viewer
- ⚖️ Resource Diff
- ✌️ Multi-Namespace Selector
- 💪 Human-friendly resource view
- ✍️ View & modify objects
- 🎉 Zero-config setup
- 😉 NOT another Electron app
- ✅ Works with any Kubernetes cluster: on-prem, GKE, EKS, AKS and others.
- 💻 Available on Windows, macOS and Linux
😎 Improvements
- Improved how we reconnect to the Kubernetes API whenever the connection is lost #558
- Added Connection status (Green Circle, Warning Triangle, Loading) to other places that it was missing
- Added ability to filter resources by their uid
- Name column is now sorted using a Natural Sort (worker-3 is shown after worker-2, instead of worker-21)
🐞 Bugs Fixed
- [Windows] Fixed a bug when scrolling up/down on the Log Viewer Discord
- [macOS] Fixed a bug when launching Apple Terminal
